calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-31-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change of Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and M. Grier. Case not called on the record. Proceedings not reported.

Petitioners father Marvin Cortez and mother Johana Tapia of minor present in court through spanish certified interpreter Ellen Rosenthal.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.

The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from current name Isis Trinidad Cortez to new name Elizabeth Trinidad Cortez.
Decree Changing Name signed by the court.

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Text Ruling
